summary: Completed testing of Admin 2FA login and dashboard features. All 12 backend tests pass. Frontend admin login UI works correctly with 2-step authentication (credentials then code). Admin dashboard with 3 tabs (Resumen/Usuarios/Violaciones) is functional. Non-admin users correctly get 403 on admin endpoints. Unauthenticated users are redirected to /admin/login.
passed_tests: POST /api/admin/login with correct credentials sends verification code email and returns success
POST /api/admin/verify with no pending code returns 400
POST /api/admin/verify with correct code sets session cookies and returns role=admin
GET /api/admin/dashboard returns full platform stats (users, subscriptions, reports)
GET /api/admin/users returns paginated user list with search
GET /api/admin/users search parameter filters users correctly
GET /api/admin/photo-violations returns pending photo violations list
Frontend /admin/login Step 1 shows email and password inputs
Frontend /admin/login Step 2 shows code input after successful credentials
Frontend /admin/login shows error message for wrong credentials
Frontend /admin/login shows toast 'Código enviado a tu email' on success
Frontend /admin redirects to /admin/login if not authenticated

admin.note: 2FA required - code sent to email, stored in db.admin_codes collection

seed_data_creation: Used existing admin user jefe@cacaradar.es (created by main agent). 2FA codes stored in db.admin_codes collection with 10-minute expiry.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin 2FA login fully implemented and tested. Admin credentials: jefe@cacaradar.es / Cacaradar123$. The 2FA flow: (1) POST /api/admin/login sends code to email, (2) POST /api/admin/verify with code from db.admin_codes collection. Admin dashboard at /admin has 3 tabs: Resumen (overview stats), Usuarios (paginated user list with search), Violaciones (photo violations). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_admin_2fa.py covers all admin endpoints. Municipality verification email includes dashboard link at /dashboard/login.

verified_features.frontend_admin_login_2step: PASS - Shows credentials then code form
